notes: Chapter 534 (ETHICS COMMISSION), 2019 SL caa.pdf p.1: 'SECTION 1. A new article of the Constitution of the State of North Dakota is created and enacted as follows: Section 1. Transparency.' Entire reprint is underlined (all added); no struck text. New article XIV, no prior version.

Chapter 534, caa.pdf p.2: 'Section 2. Lobbyists and Conflicts of Interest.' Entirely underlined (added) under the 'new article ... created and enacted' header; no struck text. New article XIV, no prior version.
Chapter 534, caa.pdf p.3: 'Section 3. North Dakota Ethics Commission.' Entirely underlined (added); no struck text. New article XIV, no prior version.
Chapter 534, caa.pdf p.3: 'Section 4. General Provisions.' Entirely underlined (added); no struck text. New article XIV, no prior version.

Found on 2001 SL CAA.pdf p.5, Chapter 593 (HCR 3018, 'RIGHT TO HUNT, TRAP, AND FISH'): 'SECTION 1. A new section to article XI of the Constitution of North Dakota is created and enacted as follows:' Clean reprint of new section, no markup. New section, no prior version.
